g.text: Core application user record (role, onboarding, profile ownership).
Auth provider tables are modeled separately in the "Auth (External/Auth Provider)" package.
The app maps auth identity to core users via tokenIdentifier.
Uniqueness enforced via index on (userId, matchedUserId).
Optionally store pairs in canonical order to avoid mirrored duplicates.
Convex does not enforce SQL foreign keys; referential integrity and uniqueness are enforced in Convex mutations/queries and indexes.
